briefing: Rebuild the forensic workstation by wiring each part to the correct socket groups.

NO_GPU.status: GPU missing on OUTPUT. Monitor signal unavailable.

NO_RAM.status: RAM missing on MEMORY. Boot failed during memory probe.

NO_CACHE.status: CACHE is missing. Diagnostic stream is degraded.

HEALTHY.status: All critical nodes online. Continue to performance tuning.

levels.context: Render recovery profile: tune CPU/RAM/GPU and pass benchmark in budget.

feedback.headline: CPU queue overloaded by weak RAM
details: Raise RAM class to GOOD or TOP before confirm.

feedback.headline: Balanced tuning profile confirmed
details: Performance and budget constraints are both satisfied.

feedback.headline: Budget guardrail exceeded
details: Reduce one or more tiers to stay within limit.

feedback.headline: Compute envelope too low
details: Increase CPU and/or GPU class to pass benchmark.

BOTTLENECK.headline: CPU queue overloaded by weak RAM
details: Raise RAM class to GOOD or TOP before confirm.

OPTIMAL.headline: Balanced tuning profile confirmed
details: Performance and budget constraints are both satisfied.

OVERBUDGET.headline: Budget guardrail exceeded
details: Reduce one or more tiers to stay within limit.

LOWPOWER.headline: Compute envelope too low
details: Increase CPU and/or GPU class to pass benchmark.

levels.context: Compilation rush profile: keep multitask latency stable and stay under budget.

feedback.headline: RAM queue blocks parallel build
details: Upgrade RAM before confirming this profile.

feedback.headline: Compilation profile accepted
details: Latency and budget are both within the target corridor.

feedback.headline: Cost ceiling exceeded
details: Lower one tier to return under procurement policy.

feedback.headline: Compute reserve too weak
details: Increase CPU or RAM class to pass this level.

BOTTLENECK.headline: RAM queue blocks parallel build
details: Upgrade RAM before confirming this profile.

OPTIMAL.headline: Compilation profile accepted
details: Latency and budget are both within the target corridor.

OVERBUDGET.headline: Cost ceiling exceeded
details: Lower one tier to return under procurement policy.

LOWPOWER.headline: Compute reserve too weak
details: Increase CPU or RAM class to pass this level.

levels.context: Virtualization profile: keep VM density stable without violating spending policy.

BOTTLENECK: [VM] host CPU waits for memory pages

feedback.headline: Memory starvation under VM load
details: Raise RAM class to avoid swap storms.

feedback.headline: Virtualization profile accepted
details: Host remains stable and budget constraints hold.

feedback.headline: Budget limit violated
details: Reduce one class before deployment.

feedback.headline: VM density target not reached
details: Increase CPU or RAM class to meet baseline.

BOTTLENECK.headline: Memory starvation under VM load
details: Raise RAM class to avoid swap storms.

OPTIMAL.headline: Virtualization profile accepted
details: Host remains stable and budget constraints hold.

OVERBUDGET.headline: Budget limit violated
details: Reduce one class before deployment.

LOWPOWER.headline: VM density target not reached
details: Increase CPU or RAM class to meet baseline.

BOTTLENECK: [VM] host CPU waits for memory pages

levels.prompt: Mount exactly three network modules to secure the archive link.

options.label: SWITCH
options.why: Segments traffic and lowers collision noise.

options.label: FIREWALL
options.why: Adds filtering barrier against hostile traffic.

options.label: FIBER
options.why: Reduces sniffing risk and improves throughput.

options.label: HUB
options.why: Broadcast behavior increases collisions and interception.

options.label: COAX
options.why: Legacy medium leaks more and adds noise.

PERFECT.headline: Link hardened
details: Collision profile minimized.
Filtering is active.
Interception surface is reduced.

GOOD.headline: Link acceptable
details: Most critical defenses are active.
One required module is still missing.

NOISY.headline: Defense mixed with noise
details: Correct core modules present, but one harmful module added.

FAIL.headline: Link remains exposed
details: Current module set does not meet secure profile.

EMPTY.headline: No modules mounted
details: Install modules before LINK START.

SELECT_ALL.headline: Brute-force selection detected
details: Selecting every module is not a valid strategy.

levels.prompt: Collision-control profile: avoid broadcast chaos and secure perimeter modules.

options.label: COAX
options.why: Legacy medium keeps interception risk high.

PERFECT.headline: Perimeter stabilized
details: Collision profile minimized.
Filtering is active.
Interception surface is reduced.

GOOD.headline: Perimeter mostly stable
details: Most critical defenses are active.
One required module is still missing.

NOISY.headline: Partial defense with noise
details: Correct core modules present, but one harmful module added.

FAIL.headline: Perimeter exposed
details: Current module set does not meet secure profile.

EMPTY.headline: No modules mounted
details: Install modules before LINK START.

SELECT_ALL.headline: Brute-force selection detected
details: Selecting every module is not a valid strategy.

levels.prompt: Filtering profile: prioritize packet inspection and low interception surface.

options.label: IDS
options.why: Detects hostile signatures and lowers leak chance.

options.label: FIBER
options.why: Keeps interception surface lower than copper links.

options.label: OPEN PROXY
options.why: Creates unmanaged ingress and eavesdrop risk.

PERFECT.headline: Filtering stack sealed
details: Collision profile minimized.
Filtering is active.
Interception surface is reduced.

GOOD.headline: Filtering mostly active
details: Most critical defenses are active.
One required module is still missing.

NOISY.headline: Mixed security profile
details: Correct core modules present, but one harmful module added.

FAIL.headline: Filtering profile failed
details: Current module set does not meet secure profile.

EMPTY.headline: No modules mounted
details: Install modules before LINK START.

SELECT_ALL.headline: Brute-force selection detected
details: Selecting every module is not a valid strategy.

briefing: Trap level: identify false peripherals and wire only valid workstation parts.
